content: npm registry's xlsx package is frozen at 0.18.5 (published 2022-03-24, confirmed via npm view time); SheetJS stopped publishing to npm and now distributes fixed versions (current 0.20.3) only via tarball from cdn.sheetjs.com. npm 0.18.5 carries two known CVEs: GHSA-4r6h-8v6p-xvw6 prototype pollution (fixed 0.19.3, triggers only when READING/parsing untrusted files -- export-only usage is unaffected per the advisory's own text) and GHSA-5pgg-2g8v-p4x9 ReDoS (fixed 0.20.2, trigger path undocumented in the advisory).
